_comment: Global MCP servers for ~/.claude/.mcp.json — copied by setup.sh/setup.ps1. Fill in tokens where needed. Serena and Playwright are enabled by default.

serena._comment: Semantic code navigation (LSP): find symbols, references, definitions. Multi-language. Requires Python + uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/).

playwright._comment: Browser automation and E2E testing. No credentials needed.

github._comment: GitHub API: repos, PRs, issues, code search, Actions. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

fabric._comment: Microsoft Fabric MCP. No credentials needed for read-only exploration.

cclsp._comment: Legacy TypeScript/JavaScript LSP (ktnyt/cclsp). Prefer Serena. Requires: npm install -g cclsp

postgres._comment: Read-only PostgreSQL access. Set DATABASE_URL env var.
